treasury.title: Treasury
treasury.deposit_hint: Deposit USDC over the Solana network from your wallet or exchange.
treasury.deposit_delayed: Your deposit may take a few minutes to appear.
treasury.wrong_network: Only USDC over the Solana network is accepted.

topology.title: Farms and parcels
topology.empty: No parcels yet. Create the first one.
topology.no_farms: No farms yet. Create the first one.
topology.assign_farmer_to: Assign a farmer to the farm {{finca}}
topology.draw_hint: Draw the parcel polygon on the map.
topology.sensor_gate: This parcel requires {{n}} sensors for its area.
topology.invalid_polygon: The polygon is not valid. Check the vertices.
topology.declare_nodes: Nodes to be installed on this plot

telemetry.title: Latest reading
telemetry.chart_pending: pH / EC / humidity / temperature series (Recharts) — coming soon
telemetry.no_data: No readings for this parcel yet.

farmers.title: Farmers of the unit
farmers.reassign: This farm already has a farmer. Reassign?

shipments.title: Shipments
shipments.empty: No shipments yet. Prepare the first one.
shipments.crop_mismatch: All parcels in the shipment must be of the same crop.
shipments.parcel_red: A parcel has an anomaly and cannot be certified.
shipments.awaiting_approval: Ready for approval. Whoever can issue was notified.

certificates.title: Certificates
certificates.revoked_on: This certificate was revoked on {{date}}. It is not valid for dispatch.
certificates.revoke_confirm: Revoking is irreversible. The parcel won't enter shipments until re-certified. State the reason.
certificates.integrity_pending: On-chain integrity pending anchoring (anchored when issued on Solana).

team.title: Team and sub-roles
team.empty: No members in the unit yet.
team.sensitive_confirm: This sub-role will be able to debit the treasury. Confirm?
team.already_member: This person already belongs to the unit. Change their sub-role.
team.last_admin: The unit cannot be left without administration. Assign the privilege to another member first.
team.subrole_in_use: This sub-role is assigned to members. Reassign them before deleting it.
team.applies_next_session: The change applies on the member's next session.

onchain.background: You can continue in the background
